title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: Find My Device - Tapping X (Cancel) on disconnected device details window does not dismiss the window and return to the map with connected devices list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature to open the map view.
4. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected and in range.
5. Disconnect the device or move it out of Bluetooth range so that the device becomes disconnected.
6. Observe that a device details window appears on the screen indicating the disconnected/lost device.
7. Tap the X (Cancel) button on the device details window.
expected: The device details window is dismissed, and the user is returned to the Find My Device map view showing the list of connected devices.
